title: calea urticifolia
intro: Calea urticifolia, also known as Mexican Damiana or False Damiana, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and parts of Central America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. Calea urticifolia is used to treat various health issues, such as anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems, and its health benefits also extend to relieving menstrual cramps and improving cognitive function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and capsules, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for those seeking natural relief.
